Title: Requires covered lenders to report to the department of financial services certain information on covered loans
Summary: Requires covered lenders to report to the department of financial services certain information on covered loans; requires the superintendent of financial services to collect and maintain such data and to annually publish a report containing aggregated information regarding covered loans; requires the superintendent of financial services to promulgate rules and regulations to implement such provisions.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the financial services law, in relation to reporting of covered loans
